REDIS_VERSION.description: Specific version of redis to install. Can be a numeric version or an alias.

REDIS_INSTALL_METHOD.description: How to install REDIS. 'system' uses the native OS package manager, 'source' compiles/downloads binaries.

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

REDIS_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for REDIS to listen on

REDIS_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for REDIS to listen on

REDIS_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for REDIS to listen on
